Physician office claims are a subset of the claim lines in the Part B carrier and DME data files, and a 
subset of physician evaluation and management (E/M) claim lines (NOTE: E/M are tabulated separately 
in this data file). The PHYS claims are defined as those with a line BETOS code (BETOS_CD) where the 
first three digits = “M1A” or “M1B” (the remainder of physician services which occur in different settings
